title: Simple Short Swords
description: A short swords texture pack that doesn't look out-of-place or lazily textured! 1.8.9 version included!
body:
Click [here](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/bedrock-short-swords/) to download the Bedrock version!\
This is a simple texture pack that shortens the sword texture, making it easier to see when playing PvP.\
The textures doesn't just get reduced, I made it so the swords still look sword-y.
1.8.9 version included!\
![Simple Short Swords](https://i.imgur.com/UlrfQAh.jpeg)\
Enjoy!
